__FORCETOC__

= Stardust Box I =
{{RewardIconWithText|Stardust Box I|blue}} get 30 random Stardust (up to {{Retext|blue|blue}}) and have a drop rate of:
* 70% {{RewardIconWithText|Green Stardust|green}}
* 30% {{RewardIconWithText|Blue Stardust|blue}}


= Stardust Box II =
{{RewardIconWithText|Stardust Box II|purple}} get 30 random Stardust (up to {{Retext|purple|purple}}) and have a drop rate of:
* 53.33% {{RewardIconWithText|Green Stardust|green}}
* 30% {{RewardIconWithText|Blue Stardust|blue}}
* 16.67% {{RewardIconWithText|Purple Stardust|purple}}

= Stardust Box III =
{{RewardIconWithText|Stardust Box III|orange}} get 30 random Stardust (up to {{Retext|orange|orange}}) and have a drop rate of:
* 48.33% {{RewardIconWithText|Green Stardust|green}}
* 30% {{RewardIconWithText|Blue Stardust|blue}}
* 15% {{RewardIconWithText|Purple Stardust|purple}}
* 6.67% {{RewardIconWithText|Orange Stardust|orange}}

[[Category:Reward Pack]]
